race.description: Sweet Sisters Boutique Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: MONARCH EXPRESS (6) blinkers go on for the first time after he pulled hard early before fading to run ninth over 1610m here in BM66 grade. Deep into the prep and expected to finish much closer with the 4kg claimer aboard. BARCELONA EXPRESS (4) has his hoof on the till after finishing in the minor money at three of his last five outings. Worked hard early to take control and was left a sitting shot late when fourth over 1400m at this track. Gets his chance to atone from the inside barrier. RELEASETHEWOLVES (12) is mixing her form and gets a key jockey change today. Snagged back from the outside barrier and failed to make an impression when ninth over 1400m at this track. Finds an easier assignment and can turn things around. PERMISSION GRANTED (2) is holding his form and doesn't have to improve much to win this fifth-up. Anchored with the 59.5kg for a game fifth over 1215m at this track. Ready for this and no shock to see him take this out.
race.rail_position: + 10m from the 800m to the 400m + 6m the remainder .
